meta_title: For Students: SaaS starter kit to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' barrier by building a production-ready SaaS using Antigravity and Claude Code. A senior-level guide for ambitious students.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is solved by shipping a functional, scalable SaaS starter kit. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid architecture and Claude Code for iterative development, you transform abstract theory into a tangible asset that proves your technical proficiency and architectural maturity to potential employers and stakeholders immediately.
content.intro:
The blank page is the student's greatest enemy. You have the theoretical knowledge, but every job application demands a track record you haven't had the chance to build yet. The cycle is brutal: you need experience to get a job, but you need a job to get experience. 

It is time to break the cycle. We aren't building a 'to-do list' app; we are deploying a production-grade SaaS architecture. By treating your first project like a commercial product, you shift from being a student to being a builder. This guide leverages the raw power of modern AI tooling to bridge the gap between code-school theory and real-world engineering.

steps.title: Architecting the Foundation
steps.description: Define the core SaaS architecture including database schema, auth flow, and API structure. This ensures your project is scalable from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-level SaaS architecture diagram and schema for a multi-tenant application using PostgreSQL, Prisma, and Next.js. Focus on security and role-based access control.

steps.title: Implementing Authentication and Identity
steps.description: Secure your application. Employers value developers who understand identity management over those who just build UI.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a secure authentication flow using NextAuth or Clerk, including middleware for protected routes and session management.

steps.title: Building the Core Business Logic
steps.description: Develop the 'value' feature of your SaaS. This is the logic that justifies your subscription model.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the server-side business logic for a subscription-based document processing tool using OpenAI API and vector storage.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Create a service layer for handling document uploads and AI processing'

steps.title: Integrating Payment Infrastructure
steps.description: A portfolio project without a payment gateway is just a prototype. Integrate Stripe to show you understand monetization.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe webhook handler to manage subscription status and user quota updates in the database.

steps.title: Deployment and CI/CD Pipeline
steps.description: Automate your deployment. A project that isn't deployed is invisible to recruiters.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a GitHub Actions workflow that runs tests and deploys to Vercel upon every push to the main branch.

pro_tips: Always include a 'Production Readiness' section in your README to show you understand DevOps, not just coding.
Use mock data that mirrors real-world edge cases to demonstrate you consider database integrity.
Document your architectural decisions in a 'Design Decisions' file; interviewers value the 'why' more than the 'how'.
Keep your commit history clean and meaningful; it acts as a secondary resume of your workflow.
Implement automated testing for your critical path; nothing screams 'junior' louder than lack of unit tests.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, perform a load test, document the results in a case study blog post, and link the live URL prominently on your GitHub profile and LinkedIn.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for permission to be a developer. Your first production-ready SaaS is the bridge between your current student status and your future engineering career. The tools exist; the blueprint is here. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
